name: Aishida Co.,Ltd
summary: Aishida Co., Ltd. engages in the research, development, manufacture, and sale of cookware and kitchen electric appliances worldwide. It offers cooking utensils, including pressure cookers, woks, frying pans, soup milk pots, steamers, kettles, kitchen sets and accessories, and other products; home appliances consisting of rice and electric pressure cookers, electric kettles, soymilk machines, electric baking pans, induction cookers, multifunctional cooking machines, and juice and bread machines; and environmental appliances, such as filters. The company was formerly known as Zhejiang Aishida Electric Co., Ltd and changed its name to Aishida Co., Ltd. in November 2019. Aishida Co., Ltd. was founded in 1987 and is based in Wenling, the People's Republic of China.
